nodes.label: Onboarding Progress Card — 'Tu progreso' Weekly Stats
nodes.description: Onboarding carousel slide (5th of 5 dots active). Card 'Esta semana / Tu progreso' shows: 847 Minutos enfocados, +23% vs semana pasada, 7-bar weekly chart with last bar highlighted teal, '12 días seguidos' streak badge. Marketing headline: 'Mide tu progreso, celebra cada paso.' Subtext: 'Visualiza cuánto has crecido y mantén tu racha viva.' Next arrow CTA at bottom-right.

nodes.label: Streak Badge — '12 días seguidos'
nodes.description: Pill badge with flame emoji + '12 días seguidos' shown inside the progress card. Teal/dark styling consistent with app accent color.

nodes.label: Weekly Bar Chart — Focused Minutes Visualization
nodes.description: 7-column bar chart inside the Tu Progreso card. Bars are dark/muted for past days; the rightmost (current day) bar is teal/active. Represents daily focused minutes for the current week.

edges.description: Streak badge is contained within the Tu Progreso onboarding card
Weekly bar chart is contained within the Tu Progreso onboarding card
